name: cypress-ecommerce-automation
description: Cypress E2E test suite - Website testing and JB Hi-Fi shopping automation by Cosmin Ghinea

scripts.test:report: npm run clean:reports && npm test && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:report:alabs: npm run clean:reports && npm run test:alabs && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate
scripts.test:report:jbhifi: npm run clean:reports && npm run test:jbhifi && npm run report:merge && npm run report:generate

author: Cosmin Ghinea
